title: vaiteaopuu/rna_design_biophy_ml: Hybrid biophysics-ML generative model for RNA design
author: Vaitea OPUU
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We present a hybrid approach that integrates RNA folding physics with machine learning to disentangle structural constraints from functional signals.
steps_raw: We present a hybrid approach that integrates RNA folding physics with machine learning to disentangle structural constraints from functional signals.
